title: avenula pratensis subsp. requienii
intro: Avenula pratensis subsp. requienii, also known as Requien's bent or vanilla grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of southern Europe and is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. Avenula pratensis subsp. requienii can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular herbal remedy among those seeking natural health benefits.
